name: Tropical Beach Selfie POV

subject.description: young woman early 20s with light brown loose beach wave hair, bright green eyes, visible freckles, soft confident smile

physical_details.body_type: slim-curvy with defined waist and round hips

skin.texture: natural with subtle glow, no over-smoothing

environment.atmosphere: warm sun, salty breeze, summer heat

ideogram.prompt: Beach selfie of young woman with light brown hair, green eyes, and freckles wearing pastel bikini and straw hat on white sand tropical beach, turquoise ocean and blue sky in background, natural sunlight, smartphone selfie perspective

recraft.prompt: Tropical beach selfie, young woman with beach waves green eyes freckles, pastel bikini straw hat, white sand turquoise water, natural sunlight, phone camera aesthetic

luma.prompt: Tropical beach moment, young woman takes selfie with phone, hair gently blowing in ocean breeze, waves softly rolling on white sand behind, warm sunlight, relaxed summer energy
luma.motion_notes: Gentle hair movement in breeze, soft wave motion in background, natural breathing

reve.prompt: High-end social media beach photography in the style of Instagram influencer content, young woman selfie with straw hat on tropical white sand beach, natural summer glow, effortless beauty

grok-imagine.prompt: Beach selfie on tropical white sand, young woman with green eyes freckles and beach waves, pastel bikini straw hat, turquoise ocean behind, natural sunny glow, phone camera selfie angle

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A high-end social media selfie photograph of a young woman in her early 20s on a tropical white sand beach. She has light brown loose beach wave hair that is slightly wind-blown, bright green eyes, and visible freckles on her cheeks and nose. Her expression is a soft confident smile with relaxed seductive energy as she looks directly at the phone camera. She has a slim-curvy figure with a defined waist and round hips, and sun-kissed natural skin with a subtle glow. She wears a thin bikini top in patterned pastel tones that is slightly stretched, and a straw beach hat worn loosely on her head. She takes the selfie at arm's length with her head slightly tilted and shoulders relaxed, leaning subtly toward the camera. The background shows turquoise ocean water with soft rolling waves, clear blue sky, and the visible horizon line. Natural sunlight from above-left creates natural highlights on her skin with a subtle glow and soft ocean reflection fill. Shot on smartphone front camera with 24mm wide equivalent lens. No watermark. No artificial smoothing. No over-processing. Natural skin texture preserved.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Young woman early 20s taking selfie on white sand tropical beach, light brown beach wave hair slightly wind-blown, bright green eyes visible freckles on cheeks and nose, soft confident smile, slim-curvy figure sun-kissed natural skin subtle glow, patterned pastel bikini top slightly stretched, straw beach hat worn loosely, selfie pose head tilted arm-length angle, turquoise ocean soft waves clear blue sky horizon behind, natural sunlight from above-left creating highlights and subtle glow, smartphone front camera 24mm aesthetic, effortless beach confidence, not over-processed
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A young woman in her early 20s takes a selfie on a white sand tropical beach. She has light brown loose beach wave hair that is slightly wind-blown with natural movement. Her bright green eyes and visible freckles on her cheeks and nose stand out. She has a soft confident smile with relaxed energy. She has a slim-curvy figure with sun-kissed natural skin showing a subtle glow without over-smoothing. She wears a thin bikini top in patterned pastel tones and a straw beach hat worn loosely. She holds the phone at arm's length with her head slightly tilted. Behind her, turquoise ocean water with soft rolling waves meets a clear blue sky at the horizon. Natural sunlight from above-left creates highlights and a subtle natural glow on her skin. Smartphone front camera selfie perspective.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the straw hat to a white baseball cap while keeping it worn at a relaxed angle. Preserve the beach waves hairstyle, green eyes, freckles, bikini, and tropical beach background.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed face with eye color, freckles, expression specifics
3_technical_camera: 'smartphone front camera', '24mm wide', selfie POV defined
6_lighting_storytelling: 'natural sunlight from above-left' = effortless summer mood
7_pov_definition: camera IS the phone for authentic selfie perspective
